name: Spaghetti Al Pomodoro e Basilico
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, peel, and chop the tomatoes, discarding seeds.
2. Heat the olive oil in a moderately deep pan.
3. Add onion and garlic; sauté until the onion is limp.
4. Discard the garlic.
5. Add chopped tomatoes, basil, salt, and pepper.
6. Simmer for about 20 minutes over moderate heat.
7. Meanwhile, bring a large pot of water to boil. Add salt to taste and spaghetti.
8. Cook the spaghetti "al dente," approximately 8 to 10 minutes.
9. Drain the spaghetti and toss with the sauce and grated Parmesan cheese.
10. Garnish each plate with some basil leaves.
11. Serve immediately.
